---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could work. Include API examples, UI mockups, or workflow descriptions if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
